productDisplayName: Quiksilver Men Black & Blue Flip Flops
description: Style Notegiorgio armani said - the difference between style and fashion is quality. That's why quiksilver comes up with this pair of flip flops crafted with superior materials. This pair is a passport to surf side cool done up in soft, comfy rubber. A warm weather essential that'll outlast the season, save this stylish pair for your next beach side vacay or sunny summer walks.Product DetailsBlue and black printed flip flops with print on the textured footbedBlack thong style straps with brandingGrooves all over the soft, rubber outsoleMaterial and CareRubberWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust
